title: Unless The Lord Builds

sections.label: Intro
lines: (A D G Bm Em)

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Unless the Lord builds the house,
Its builders labor in vain.
Unless He guards the city’s gates,
Our watchmen’s work is drained.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: Rise early, toil through the night,
Yet bread comes not from strife.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Oh, He grants His beloved rest,
A peace no toil can find.
The hands of God are ever near,
Our hope in Him aligned.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Children are arrows in the hand,
A heritage we claim.
Blessed is the one whose quiver’s full,
Their future bears His name.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Oh, He grants His beloved rest,
A peace no toil can find.
The hands of God are ever near,
Our hope in Him aligned.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: The house He builds will never fall,
It’s rooted in His grace.
A stronghold standing firm and tall,
Eternal is its place.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Oh, He grants His beloved rest,
A peace no toil can find.
The hands of God are ever near,
Our hope in Him aligned.

epigraph: Except the LORD build the house
styleNote: Gentle Fingerstyle Guitar · Setting A Reflective Tone · Echoes Of Harmony Linger
